description: Book of MEME (BOME) emerged in 2024 on Solana as a culturally driven, meta-aware memecoin built around decentralized meme preservation and explosive community momentum. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 BOME gives original BOME holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Book of MEME
